message:
feat: expand CLI tooling, harden core subsystems, redesign TUI screens, add thread views

Broad enhancement across the MCP Agent Mail Rust stack (49 files,
+1496/-432 lines) covering CLI infrastructure, core reliability,
database layer, TUI interface, and end-to-end testing:

CLI improvements (mcp-agent-mail-cli):
- context.rs: refine execution context management for e2e test isolation
- e2e_artifacts.rs: improve test artifact collection and reporting
- e2e_runner.rs: enhance test runner with better failure diagnostics
- golden.rs: update golden test infrastructure for format evolution
- lib.rs: expand CLI entry points and command routing

Core hardening (mcp-agent-mail-core):
- bocpd.rs: refine Bayesian online changepoint detection for anomaly
  alerting on message flow patterns
- conformal.rs: improve conformal prediction intervals for latency
  estimation and SLA monitoring
- disk.rs: enhance on-disk persistence layer reliability
- evidence_ledger.rs: strengthen append-only evidence logging
- flake_triage.rs: improve flaky test detection and quarantine logic
- intern.rs: optimize string interning for reduced memory pressure
- lock_order.rs: refine deadlock-free lock ordering protocol
- proptest_generators.rs: expand property-based test generators
- setup.rs: streamline initialization and configuration

Database layer (mcp-agent-mail-db):
- integrity.rs: add consistency verification checks
- pool.rs: +93 lines expanding connection pool with health monitoring
- s3fifo.rs: tune S3-FIFO eviction cache for agent mail workloads
- search_service.rs: improve full-text search query execution
- tracking.rs: enhance message delivery tracking

TUI redesign (mcp-agent-mail-server):
- New thread_detail.rs: dedicated thread detail view with message
  threading visualization and inline reply
- New thread_list.rs: thread list view with sorting, filtering, and
  keyboard navigation
- tui_app.rs, tui_events.rs, tui_focus.rs: refactor application shell
  for new screen navigation model
- tui_macro.rs: +61 lines reworking the macro execution TUI
- tui_poller.rs: optimize background data refresh intervals
- Analytics, dashboard, explorer, messages, reservations, search,
  threads, timeline screens: incremental UX improvements
- tool_metrics.rs: refine tool-level performance instrumentation
- frame_bench.rs: update frame rendering benchmarks

Scripts and testing:
- New scripts/preflight.sh: pre-flight validation for deployment
- Update e2e test scripts: console, HTTP, MCP API parity, serve,
  TUI startup, TUI WASM
- Update TUI v3 interaction e2e test
- Refresh Cargo.lock for dependency changes
- Update beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+startup_write_failure_diagnostics() {

+    fi
+
+    {
+        echo "Console E2E server startup failure diagnostics"
+        echo "=============================================="
+        echo "timestamp: $(_e2e_now_rfc3339)"
+        echo "label: ${label}"
+        echo "port: ${port}"
+        echo "startup_timeout_seconds: ${startup_timeout_s}"
+        echo "pid: ${pid}"
+        echo "log_path: ${log_path}"
+        echo ""
+        echo "=== startup command ==="
+        if [ -f "${case_dir}/command.txt" ]; then
+            cat "${case_dir}/command.txt"
+        else
+            echo "(command file missing)"
+        fi
+        echo ""
+        echo "=== process status ==="
+        if [ -n "${pid}" ]; then
+            ps -p "${pid}" -o pid=,ppid=,etime=,stat=,args= 2>/dev/null || echo "(process not running)"
+        else
+            echo "(no pid)"
+        fi
+        echo ""
+        echo "=== server transcript tail (last 200 lines) ==="
